data.title: OSE Immunotherapeutics Reports Full Year 2025 Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results and 2026 Q1 Cash Position
data.description: OSE Immunotherapeutics has released its unaudited consolidated financial results for the full year 2025, along with its cash position for the first quarter of 2026. The company's financial performance for 2025 indicated significant figures, while its cash position for Q1 of 2026 reflects its current liquidity status.

data.title: Strong Q1 2026 financial results,  on track to achieve PowerUP 2026 targets
data.description: The net income group share showed a significant increase, reaching EUR 266 million in the recent quarter, marking a 21.2% rise compared to the same period in 2025. The return on tangible equity (ROTE) also saw a notable improvement, standing at 13.9% versus 11.0% in Q1 2025. Earnings per share (EPS) reached EUR 0.31, reflecting a 29% increase when compared to Q1 2025.

data.title: Inbank unaudited financial results for Q1 2026
data.description: In 2026, Inbank kicked off the year with robust sales growth and consistent underlying performance, although profitability growth was more tempered. In Q1 of 2026, Inbank generated a consolidated net profit of €4 million, marking an 11% decrease compared to the previous year. The return on equity (ROE) for the same period was recorded at 9.4%.

data.title: INVL Technology Interim information for 3 months of 2026
data.description: As of March 31, 2026, INVL Technology's equity reached EUR 65.5 million, translating to EUR 5.4708 per share. This marks an increase from December 31, 2025, when the figures stood at EUR 64.62 million and EUR 5.4013 per share.
74Software saw significant organic growth of double digits in Q1 2026, making strides in recurring software revenue.

data.title: DAHON Debuts LUNDEN GR at Eurobike 2026 - 20-Inch Tri-Fold Bike Redefining Urban Mobility
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on April 30, 2026, DAHON TECH (listed as 2543.HK on HKEX) unveiled the LUNDEN GR, a 20-inch tri-fold bike designed to enhance compact performance for urban commuting and mixed-terrain biking. This new model integrates DAHON's exclusive DAHON-V technology to provide improved mobility and efficiency.

data.title: Landis+Gyr Announces Sale of Rhebo to Everfield
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Cham, Switzerland, Landis+Gyr Group AG (SIX: LAND), a prominent global energy technology company focused on advancing innovation in grid solutions, revealed the signing of a firm deal to divest Rhebo GmbH to Everfield Germany GmbH. This strategic move signifies a significant development in the energy sector as it involves key players in the industry.

data.title: Wego Brings Türkiye's Rich Travel Experiences Closer to MENA Travellers
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on April 30, 2026, it was reported that Wego, the leading travel app and the biggest online travel marketplace in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region, has revealed a new partnership with the Türkiye Tourism Promotion and Development Agency (TGA) to improve their services. This collaboration aims to leverage the strengths of both organizations to enhance travel opportunities.

data.title: Lazard to Acquire Campbell Lutyens, Creating the Global Leader in Private Capital Advisory
data.description: Lazard, Inc. (NYSE: LAZ) has solidified Lazard CL as their third global business by appointing Holcombe Green and Gordon Bajnai as Co-CEOs. On April 30, 2026, the company announced the acquisition of Campbell Lutyens through a definitive agreement. This strategic move enhances their position in the market and marks significant growth for Lazard.

data.title: CREDIT AGRICOLE SA: First quarter 2026 results - ROBUST RESULTS DESPITE MARKET TURBULENCE
data.description: During a Board of Directors meeting on April 29, 2026, Crédit Agricole S.A. was notified by SAS Rue La Boétie regarding its plan to acquire shares of Crédit Agricole S.A. through market purchases, with a cap set at 800 million euros. SAS Rue La Boétie has no plans to exceed a 65% stake in the share capital of Crédit Agricole S.A. Further information on this transaction can be found in a press release released by SAS Rue La Boétie today.
